title: Venue
body: The workshop will be held at the Chennai Mathematical Institute (CMI), Siruseri, Chennai. Directions and a campus map will be posted here closer to the event.

title: Accommodation
body: Details on on-campus and nearby accommodation for outstation participants will be added here.

title: Registration
body: Registration is expected to open in the coming months. There is no fee information to share yet — this section will be updated once details are finalised.

title: Financial support
body: Information on travel and accommodation support for students and early-career researchers will be posted here.

title: Contact
body: For queries about the workshop, write to the organisers.
